refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize energy consumption per ton moved to meet or exceed the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the high-level FR into a measurable and actionable sub-FR focused on minimizing energy per ton moved aligns with the acceptance criteria and enables targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure total energy used and tons moved over the evaluation period and verify energy_per_ton ≤ E_target.
sub_frs: Minimize energy consumption of vehicle operations
Optimize task scheduling to reduce energy waste
Monitor and report energy efficiency KPIs

candidate_dps: Real-time energy monitoring and feedback system
selected_dp.selected_dp: Combination of energy-efficient vehicle powertrain design and real-time energy monitoring and feedback system

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle powertrain and monitoring system
Data flow between monitoring and scheduling
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interfaces; adaptive scheduling is deferred to higher-level FRs.

assumptions_risks: Vehicle powertrain improvements will significantly impact energy efficiency
Real-time monitoring data is accurate and timely
Scheduling optimization is out of scope at this level
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider including task scheduling optimization in next decomposition level for completeness.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for vehicle powertrain and energy consumption

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends energy consumption and operational data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Receives control commands and updates from NGHE Solution

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of powertrain DP; low diffusion risk as energy monitoring sensors are integral.
Contains monitoring and feedback logic but less direct control of powertrain.
Minimal containment; mostly external control interface.
No containment of energy efficiency DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning energy efficiency DP related to powertrain to Vehicle module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for monitoring and feedback functions
Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for telemetry data
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify boundaries between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for monitoring vs control to reduce interface complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are measurable and logically mapped to candidate DPs with clear rationale.

diffusion_risks: Energy monitoring logic split between Vehicle sensors and NGHE Solution software
Data interface complexity on Telemetry and Network Link
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module has strong containment of powertrain DP; monitoring functions partially diffuse.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Energy consumption and tonnage data can be collected via Telemetry interface for verification.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of powertrain DP by Vehicle; monitoring and feedback split with NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts for telemetry data exchange.
Consider consolidating monitoring functions to reduce diffusion.

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, interface and containment boundaries between Vehicle and NGHE Solution require refinement to reduce diffusion risks and clarify ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize energy consumption of vehicle operations
Optimize task scheduling to reduce energy waste
Monitor and report energy efficiency KPIs

revise.why: To clarify module boundaries and reduce diffusion of monitoring and feedback functions.

assumptions: Vehicle powertrain improvements are primary driver of energy efficiency
Telemetry data is reliable and timely
open_risks: Interface complexity may increase integration effort
Monitoring function diffusion may impact maintainability
evidence_needed: Telemetry data accuracy and latency measurements
Module containment analysis with refined interface definitions
